content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of the propose-new-bead handler implementation. The change adds ProposeNewBeadInput/ProposeNewBeadOutcome types and handle_propose_new_bead() in milestone_record/service.rs, wires dispatch via reconcile_proposed_beads_after_success() in success_reconciliation.rs, adds ProposedBeadCreated journal event type, and extends FinalReviewProposal and FinalReviewCanonicalAmendment with proposed_title/proposed_scope/severity fields with conservative merge semantics. All 794 tests pass, clippy is clean. The implementation correctly follows the PlannedElsewhere handler pattern: defensive re-check prevents duplicate bead creation, bead creation flows through BrMutationAdapter, sync occurs after creation, journal events record full evidence, and a conservative threshold (>2 per pass) logs an error-level warning. The merge logic in final_review.rs appropriately downgrades ProposeNewBead to FixNow on any reviewer disagreement about metadata fields. No correctness bugs, safety issues, or significant maintainability risks found.

## Amendments

None.
